title: serratula pygmaea
intro: Serratula pygmaea, also known as Dwarf Milk Thistle, is a low-growing plant species belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its silymarin content. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as protecting the liver, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Serratula pygmaea can be prepared as a herbal infusion, capsule, or tincture, often used to promote overall well-being and support liver health.
